description: Specially created for teenagers and young adults, this colourful Arpenaz 18+ backpack from quechua is a perfect apparel for a day's outing. If you enjoy that stylish look, then this bag makes for a great college wear. Capacity: 18 litresWeight: 270 gWarranty: 5 years Made of 100% PU coated polyester on the outer, with a PU coated nylon lining inside for durability and comfort Padded with 100% polyethylene for enhanced comfort and durability One main zippered compartment and one outer zippered pocket with a pole for ample space to stash away belongings Foam padded adjustable shoulder straps and back to protect the shoulders and back from injuries by evenly distributing weight Thumb loops to rest on the bag while walking CareStore backpack in a dry placeDo not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or ironHand wash using luke warm soapy waterUse waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the fabric
